data.title: Built for Ultimate Touch Experience: Goodix Unveils Next‑Gen Flexible OLED Touch Controller GT9926
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on April 1, 2026, Goodix Technology introduced its latest flexible OLED touch screen controller, the GT9926, which is now available in the OPPO K15 Pro+ gaming phone. This controller is designed for ultra-thin devices and boasts cutting-edge technology for enhanced touch screen capabilities. The GT9926 is set to revolutionize the user experience with its advanced features.

data.title: Hyakumangoku Festival in Kanazawa: A Grand Procession Rooted in Samurai Legacy
data.description: In Kanazawa, Japan, a regional media platform called Kanazawa Biyori, located in Hokuriku, aims to spread the cultural essence of the area with a wider audience. They showcase not just the famous landmarks, but also the traditional practices that represent the unique identity of the region. This initiative started on April 1, 2026, indicating a recent development in promoting the local culture. By emphasizing the lifestyle and heritage of Hokuriku, Kanazawa Biyori seeks to engage with a larger audience and highlight the significance of the customs that shape the region. This endeavor signifies a dedication to preserving and sharing the valuable traditions of Kanazawa, Japan.

data.title: A Letter to Investors from the CEO of Robo.ai: Optimizing Capital Structure and Advancing Core Businesses with Operational Resilience
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on April 1, 2026, Robo.ai made a significant announcement to investors, partners, and associates regarding a reverse stock split of its ordinary shares. The company has decided to implement a 1-for-20 reverse stock split. This move aims to consolidate the existing shares, with every 20 shares being converted into one share. This decision, spearheaded by the Chief Executive Officer, is a strategic step taken by the company to enhance its stock structure and potentially increase shareholder value.

data.title: Nauticus Robotics, Inc. Announces Delay in Filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K
data.description: Nauticus Robotics, Inc. has decided to reschedule its Earnings Call as it disclosed that it would not be submitting its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year that ended. The company, known for its advancements in subsea robotics and software, operates under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: KITT. The specific date for the rescheduled Earnings Call has not been announced yet.

data.title: QXO Completes Acquisition of Kodiak Building Partners
data.description: In a recent announcement, QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) has finalized the acquisition of Kodiak Building Partners from Court Square Capital Partners for around $2.25 billion. This strategic move is set to broaden QXO’s reach in the market, increasing its addressable market size to over $200 billion. Brad Jacobs, who serves as the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of QXO, emphasized that this acquisition will enable them to offer customers an expanded array of products and enhanced services. The integration of Kodiak into QXO's portfolio is expected to bring significant benefits and opportunities for the company.

data.title: ALGO price surged 19.52% to $0.10, eyeing $0.12 breakout after RSI at 68.34. Bears watch $0.08 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ALGO saw a significant increase, rising by 19.52% to reach $0.10, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates momentum at 68.34. Analysts predict a test of the $0.12 resistance level in the coming days based on technical indicators. However, if the price is unable to break through resistance, bears are targeting a support level at $0.08.
